blockers.description: 4 human UAT items blocked on live scan/position data
blockers.workaround: These can only be verified after running bensdorp1 scan on a live trading day and recording at least one buy

decisions.decision: 4 blocked UAT items accepted as live-data-only
decisions.rationale: Items require actual scan run and buy confirmation — cannot be seeded synthetically without breaking strategy invariants

next_action: Run /gsd-complete-milestone to archive phase 09 and close out v1, OR run /gsd-audit-milestone to validate milestone completion before archiving
context_notes: Phase 09 is the final phase of v1. All 9 plans executed. 27 automated verification truths all VERIFIED. 366 tests passing, 92% coverage, mypy strict clean, ruff clean. 4 UAT items are live-data-blocked — they pass once the user performs their first real scan and buy. The project is functionally complete and ready for real-world use.
